meaning: vt.使脱衣服,暴露,使卸去装饰vi.脱衣服n.便服,晨衣
examples: The first thing I thought was how in the world did the crew decide who would help her undress?
He appeared at the window in a state of undress.
She went out, leaving Rachel to undress and take a shower.
It is unclear whether this was the man who was arrested and ordered to undress.
Charles Jordan, who has Alzheimer's disease, would undress in the bathroom at the shopping mall.
